action.reasoning: Observation: ffmpeg-based codec aug works for opus/gsm/g722/alaw/amrnb in-memory. Best test EER 0.0956. Train.py broken. ~7.4h, 14 iter left. Analysis: Need clean rebuild with real codec aug. Pre-encoding 25k×5 codecs to disk is bulky; better: do ffmpeg encoding in dataloader workers (CPU bound, 48 cores). With num_workers=8-12, throughput should be fine. Decision: Write clean model.py, data.py, train.py, predict.py with real ffmpeg codec aug applied randomly per sample. Train 3 epochs with XLS-R-300M.
